steps.title: Identify the starting value and rate
steps.content:
At birth, $x=0$ and the lamb weighs $7$ pounds, so the function must have $+7$ as its initial value.

The lamb gains $\frac{1}{3}$ pound per day, so the coefficient of $x$ must be $\frac{1}{3}$.

steps.title: Write the function
steps.content:
Weight after $x$ days equals starting weight plus daily gain:
$$g(x)=7+\frac{1}{3}x$$
$$g(x)=\frac{1}{3}x+7$$
That matches Choice B — $g(x) = \frac{1}{3}x + 7$, so B.
